category_sources: Official GitHub README describes sad as a batch file edit tool with diff preview before committing changes.
source_facts.description says it is a CLI search and replace tool.
display_name_sources: Official repository and README use sad / SAD.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage, flags, requirements, and installation instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ms-jpq/sad; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README documents regex flags, diff previews, fzf integration, and Rust source installation.
source_facts.description identifies CLI search and replace.
